content.full_text:
October 3, 2002

Gail J. Hodyke
Conflict of Interest Officer
Los Alamos National Laboratory
Post Office Box 1663, Mail Stop D449
Los Alamos, New Mexico 87545

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. I-02-253

Dear Ms. Hodyke:

We are in receipt of your September 12, 2002 letter requesting informal assistance¹ under the provisions of the Political Reform Act.² The Fair Political Practices Commission may only provide formal written advice to someone whose duties are in question under the Act or to their authorized representation. (Government Code Section 83114(b).) Regulation 18329(b)(2) specifies:

"(2) Requests for formal written advice will not be acted upon unless the following requirements are met:
(A) The name, title or position, and mailing address of the person whose duties are in question are provided. In addition, if the request is submitted by an authorized representative, it shall contain a specific statement that such authorization has been made."

Additionally, your inquiry is hypothetical, which under regulation 18329(b)(8)(D), is a circumstance in which the FPPC may decline to provide written advice. However, generally speaking, after a review of the letters and regulations interpreting the Act, no specific exceptions from the "revolving door" provisions of the Act applicable to University of California employees were identified. If you should have a specific question about a specific official please contact us again for advice, with that individual's consent. I enclose a copy of regulation 18329 and a revolving door fact sheet for your review.

¹ Informal assistance does not provide the requestor with the immunity provided by an opinion or formal written advice. (Section 83114; regulation 18329(c)(3).)
² Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.

Please contact me at (916) 322-5660 should you have any additional questions.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel

Enclosures
JWW:jg
